technique_summary: Educational presentation covering laparoscopic surgery learning curve concepts, FLS training validation, and various training modalities including dry lab, synthetic models, and live surgery proctorship.

dry lab training setup and validation
verbal_cues: tips and tricks for skill development
adopting learning mindset vs fixed mindset
multiple training avenues to shorten learning curve
common_errors_addressed: relying on drills alone without proper mentorship
